title: Multi-turn chat
summary: Stateful conversation via client.chats.create — the SDK retains history across send_message calls. Token usage accumulates across turns.
notes: Each turn re-sends the entire history — input tokens grow O(n) with conversation length.
For long sessions, pair with explicit context caching (see text.context-cache) to discount the prefix.
When migrating between Gemini versions, role/parts shape is stable but tool-call wrapping inside parts has shifted; re-test multi-turn flows with tools after a model bump.
